calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Arnoldo Casino, is present.
Attorney, Sean Joyce, appearing for the plaintiff through limited scope.
Defendant, Arnold De La Cruz and Dominque Jones, are present.
Attorney, Dana Peck, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungres, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of Feb-16-2009 is vacated.
